title: Garden Gnome Plant Hugger Planter Hanger | Flower Pot Hanging Decoration | Outdoor Gonk Plant Decoration - Colour Varies One Supplied
features: PLANT HANGER | Create a delightful display with one of these garden gnome plant pot decorations, look equally fabulous as a feature on your patio planters or indoor flower vase
PLANT POT HUGGER | Our pot huggers come in four assorted colours - one colour will be selected and sent at random. (Please contact our customer service team if you have a preferred colour choice)
PERFECT GARDEN GIFT | This charming pot hanger makes a charming addition to your own garden, or a special little gardening gift - ideal for those who love their garden
GARDEN PLANTER DECORATION | Pot decoration can be used widely with anything with a lipped edge, pots, planters, vases, mirrors, lamps even fruit bowls
GARDEN ORNAMENTS | Simply hang over the edge of your planter, suitable for indoors or outdoors, alone or as part of a larger display. Measures approximately 10cm
